title: The Ashen Covenant
synopsis: A medium barrow built for a mage who struck a bargain with something old. The bargain was never completed. Whatever waits in the reliquary at the heart of the ruin still demands its due — and will keep demanding until something is sacrificed to appease it. The barrow has since been colonised by vermin, scavengers, and things drawn to old power.

areas.name: Ossuary Entrance
areas.at_a_glance: A vaulted entry hall choked with skulls stacked floor to ceiling. A wall of fire blocks the far passage — old wood and bone fuel it. The heat hits you before you're fully inside.
details: The skulls are arranged by size, smallest near the top. Someone spent time on this.
Beneath the fire, the floor is blackened but not warped. This has burned before — many times.
Scratched into the lintel above the fire, barely visible through the heat shimmer: a single word in an old script.
areas.threat_telltale: The fire is not dying down. It has been burning a long time.

areas.name: Anointed Chamber
areas.at_a_glance: A low-ceilinged passage that smells of old oil and something mineral. The floor feels faintly wrong underfoot — not wet, just different. Faint vibrations rise through the stone at irregular intervals.
details: The stone has a faint greasy sheen — anointed with something long dried.
One flagstone near the centre sits slightly proud of its neighbours.
Above the raised flagstone, a hairline crack runs across the ceiling.
areas.threat_telltale: The vibrations come from above, not below.

connections.label: north passage back toward the fire
east door, swollen in its frame

areas.name: Wailing Corridor
areas.at_a_glance: A long corridor lined with bones set into alcoves. Wind moves through here from somewhere — a low, reedy moan follows each gust. The far end is dark.
details: The bones in the alcoves are old but the alcoves themselves have been disturbed — recently.
Something has been feeding on the bones. Gnaw marks, not rodent-sized.
Wedged behind a femur in one of the lower alcoves: a squat stone idol with a hinged jaw.
areas.threat_telltale: The moaning stops abruptly. Something in the dark has noticed you.

items.name: Lockjaw Idol
items.description: A palm-sized stone idol with a hinged jaw. Clamp it onto a chest, door, or portal to seal it shut until dawn.

npcs.name: Giant Fire Beetle
npcs.description: A beetle the size of a dog, hostile and lurking in the dark. Bioluminescent glands provide dim amber light. Its bite is savage.
npcs.first_impression: A beetle the size of a dog crouches motionless in the far alcove. Two cold points of amber light — its glands — are the only sign it is alive.

connections.label: north door, iron-barred
connections.locked_description: Heavy iron bar dropped into brackets on the far side.

connections.label: west door, swollen in its frame

areas.name: Guardian Hall
areas.at_a_glance: A broad hall dominated by a cracked stone statue of a robed figure, one arm raised. Old blood darkens the floor around its base. The smell is organic — not rot exactly, but close.
details: The statue's raised hand once held something. The grip is empty, the stone around it cleaner than the rest.
The blood on the floor is not all old. Some of it is fresh.
Behind the statue's plinth, half-hidden in shadow: a leather satchel with a buckled flap.
areas.threat_telltale: The clicking of mandibles stops when you stop moving.

items.name: Forager's satchel
items.description: A leather satchel containing a cracked mirror, a functional lantern, and a stoppered wineskin. Roughly 4 gold worth of salvage.

npcs.name: Giant Ants
npcs.description: Two giant ants the size of terriers, foraging the hall. Neutral unless provoked or their colony is threatened. Once blood is drawn, they fight to the death.
npcs.first_impression: Two ants the size of terriers move methodically through the hall, mandibles clicking as they work.
npcs.telltale: They are not eating. They are carrying fragments of metal toward a crack in the east wall.

connections.label: east door, iron-barred
connections.locked_description: Iron bar on the far side.

connections.label: southeast passage, door jammed in frame
south door, iron-barred
connections.locked_description: Iron bar dropped into brackets on this side.

areas.name: Ghostlight Hall
areas.at_a_glance: Pale light pulses from cracks in the walls — cold, sourceless, moving like breath. Five kobolds crouch around the remains of something recently killed, passing pieces between them. They look up.
details: The ghostlight is brightest near the northern wall, where a deep crack runs floor to ceiling.
Voices — layered, overlapping, too faint to parse — come from inside the crack.
The kobolds' weapons are mismatched but well-maintained. These aren't scavengers.
areas.threat_telltale: The ghostlight dims slightly when raised voices fill the room.

items.name: Great sword, etched pommel
items.description: A heavy sword with an intricately etched pommel. Well-balanced, clearly made for someone with reach.

npcs.name: Kobold Warriors
npcs.description: Five kobold warriors, small reptilian humanoids in scraps of armour. Curious but not immediately aggressive. They coordinate well and will press ranged attacks if a fight starts.
npcs.first_impression: Five small reptilian figures in scraps of armour, crouched over a meal. They have stopped eating.
npcs.telltale: The largest one hasn't reached for a weapon yet. It is waiting to see what you do first.

connections.label: west door, iron-barred
connections.locked_description: Iron bar on the far side.

areas.name: Hieroglyph Hall
areas.at_a_glance: The walls are covered floor to ceiling in carved script — tight, regular, covering every surface including the ceiling. A small fire burns in the centre, tended by a seething mass of rats. The smell is awful.
details: The hieroglyphs on the north wall are different from the rest — newer cuts, a rougher hand, written in haste.
The rats are cooking something unidentifiable on a flat stone over the fire. There is a system to it.
Behind a collapsed section of the west wall, half-buried under rubble: a shirt of dark mail that seems to absorb the firelight.
areas.threat_telltale: The carved script near the door includes a repeated symbol — the same one that appears above the fire.

items.name: Grave-Ward Mail
items.description: Dark chainmail, armour +1. Undead cannot drain life from the wearer on a partial success.

npcs.name: Rat Swarm
npcs.description: Dozens of rats moving with unsettling coordination. Curious, not immediately hostile. Carry filth fever in their bites — onset delayed hours after infection.
npcs.first_impression: Dozens of rats swarm the centre of the room, moving with unsettling coordination around a small fire.
npcs.telltale: They part to let you pass, then close behind you.

connections.label: west passage, door jammed in frame

areas.name: Sarcophagus Hall
areas.at_a_glance: Three stone sarcophagi line the walls, lids displaced or shattered. The ceiling is alive — thousands of bats packed into every crack and crevice. Fresh footprints in the dust lead toward the far door and stop.
details: The sarcophagi are empty. Whatever was in them left through the lids, not the sides.
The footprints stop mid-hall with no side passages and no explanation.
Lodged in a crack in the nearest sarcophagus, wrapped in old leather: a small idol carved from polished amber.
areas.threat_telltale: The footprints in the dust were made by bare feet.

items.name: Polished amber idol
items.description: A small idol carved from a single piece of amber, perfectly smooth. Worth 25 gp to the right buyer — more to someone who knows what it is.

npcs.name: Bat Swarm
npcs.description: Thousands of bats roosting in the ceiling. Suspicious and easily startled. Loud noise or bright light sends them into a panicked swarm.
npcs.first_impression: The ceiling shifts and rustles — a living mass of bats, unsettled but not yet moving.
npcs.telltale: They have nested around something in the far corner. They are not pleased about you noticing.

areas.name: Cursed Reliquary
areas.at_a_glance: A wide chamber filled with ash — ankle-deep, undisturbed. At the centre, a stone reliquary on a plinth, its carved surface dark with old staining. The far side of the room ends in a crumbled edge — a broken bridge over a drop into darkness. The air tastes of metal.
details: The ash smells faintly of hair and cloth, not wood. It is very fine.
The reliquary is sealed with iron clasps shaped like hands pressed flat. They are warm to the touch.
At the edge of the drop, a great sword has been driven point-first into the remaining stone, its etched pommel facing the reliquary — an offering, or a warning.
areas.threat_telltale: The ash near the reliquary has been disturbed. Something has been here recently.

items.name: Great sword, etched pommel
items.description: A great sword driven point-first into the stone at the edge of the drop. The pommel is etched with the same script that lines the walls of the barrow.

metadata.author: example
metadata.quest: Sacrifice something to appease whatever waits in the reliquary.
